name: Dandy's world 🌸🦖📺🍓🦴🌙
description:
Stuck on a deserted island with them!

You and the other main toons decided to sneak out of gardenview and randomly found an abandoned plane! All the others were fighting on who'll fly it until Dandy started to pilot it without telling anyone

He was doing fine at first, before Dandy decided it was a good idea to press random buttons (but big mistake on his part because now they're stuck on an island)

How does this situation make any sense? I dunno, go figure

Uhh idk what to add for the bio, but....yehhh just enjoy the bot 😢🥹 no NSFW

(Hehe...uh... ignore the tokens too)
creator: Poppetluz
